retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function runs only once at module exit; retry is meaningless.

judge.reason: The primary purpose of bfq_exit is module cleanup, not reference-count management. It performs multiple teardown operations (unregistering scheduler, blkcg policy, and destroying slab caches). The refcount decrement inside bfq_slab_kill is only one incidental step within broader exit logic.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function runs only once at module exit; retry is meaningless.
